one_minute_value_explanation: AOF v9.4 users can validate the release from a clean checkout because the TASK-114 role, team, and Council evidence required by release-state audit is now committed.
thirty_second_version_delta: v9.4.2 does not add provider authority; it fixes clean-checkout release audit reproducibility by committing the missing TASK-114 execution evidence.
product_review_trigger: If release audit passes only on one local machine, reopen as a release reproducibility and evidence packaging issue.
not_proven: This patch delta does not prove production provider execution, semantic correctness, credential safety, billing safety, actual rollback execution, or market adoption.
